B2C Campaign - Source Document

Complete source document for the HeyZack B2C crowdfunding campaign deck

HeyZack B2C Crowdfunding Deck Source Document

Deck Metadata

  • Purpose: Crowdfunding Campaign (Kickstarter/Indiegogo)
  • Audience: Tech-savvy homeowners, eco-conscious consumers, early adopters
  • Target Slides: 12
  • Tone: Warm, approachable, aspirational, exciting
  • Generated: 2026-01-25

Brand Styling

Colors

RoleHexUsage
Primary Blue#243984Trust elements, security features
Primary Pink#E82F89CTAs, excitement, emotional moments
Black#2E2D2CBody text, supporting copy
Grey#E9EDEFBackgrounds, cards, dividers
Gradient#243984 → #E82F89Hero moments, title slides, CTAs

Typography

  • Headlines: Friendly sans-serif (Inter/Poppins) — Bold, 48-64px
  • Body: Warm, readable — Regular, 18-24px
  • CTAs: Bold, uppercase, button styling

Visual Direction

  • Photography: Real people in real homes, warm lighting, lifestyle focus
  • Diversity: Inclusive representation across all imagery
  • Emotion: Happy, relaxed, in control of their space
  • Products: Shown naturally in settings, not on white backgrounds

Content by Slide

Slide 1: Title

Headline: Your Home. Just Smarter. Subhead: AI-Powered Smart Home for Everyone Visual: Beautiful modern living room with smart devices visible (but not dominant). Family or couple relaxing. CTA Badge: “Join the Revolution” — Pink button style Tagline: “Finally, a smart home that’s actually smart.” Speaker Notes: Set the emotional tone immediately. This isn’t about technology—it’s about life.

Slide 2: The Problem

Headline: Smart Homes Shouldn’t Be Complicated Body: You bought into the promise of a “smart home”—but the reality is anything but.

Pain Points (3 cards):

  1. Multiple Apps — Every brand needs its own app. Lights? One app. Thermostat? Another. Doorbell? Yet another.
  2. Confusing Setup — Hours of frustration. Maybe hiring an electrician. Definitely googling error messages.
  3. High Cost, Low Value — Expensive systems that promised savings but never delivered.

Visual: Split screen—frustrated person vs. chaotic app drawer Speaker Notes: Make them feel seen. They’ve lived this frustration.

Slide 3: Meet the Homeowners

Headline: Built for People Like You Body: We designed HeyZack for real homeowners with real needs—not just tech enthusiasts.

Persona 1: Tech-Savvy Tyler

  • Age: 28-35
  • Urban apartment or starter home
  • Gadget lover, early adopter
  • Pain: “I want the best tech, but I’m tired of things not working together”
  • Goal: Seamless integration, impressive setup, voice control everything

Persona 2: Energy-Conscious Emma

  • Age: 35-50
  • Suburban family home
  • Practical, budget-conscious
  • Pain: “I’m spending too much on energy and don’t know where it goes”
  • Goal: Lower bills, easy to use, peace of mind

Visual: Lifestyle photos representing each persona Speaker Notes: Humanize the audience. “Which one are you?”

Slide 4: The Solution

Headline: Introducing HeyZack AI Home Subhead: The smart home system that actually makes life easier. Body: One platform. 128 devices. Genuine AI intelligence.

Key Benefits:

  1. One App for Everything — All your devices, one beautiful interface
  2. AI That Learns — Not schedules. Not rules. Real intelligence that adapts to you.
  3. Works Together — Lights, climate, security, energy—all talking to each other automatically

Visual: Product ecosystem hero shot with app interface mockup Accent: Pink glow behind products Speaker Notes: This is the “aha” moment. The promise of smart home, finally delivered.

Slide 5: How It Works

Headline: Setup in Minutes. Smart Forever. Body: No contractors. No confusion. No kidding.

3-Step Process:

  1. Plug & Play

    • DIY installation in minutes
    • No electrician, no special tools
    • Works with your existing wiring

  2. Connect

    • Download the HeyZack app
    • Scan device QR code
    • Automatically joins your network

  3. Relax

    • AI observes your patterns for 2-4 weeks
    • Begins optimizing automatically
    • Learns and improves over time

Visual: Clean icons for each step, connected by flowing line Speaker Notes: Emphasize simplicity. “If you can change a lightbulb, you can install HeyZack.”

Slide 6: Product Range

Headline: 128 Products. Endless Possibilities. Subhead: Everything you need to make your home smart—from one company.

Categories with Entry Points:

CategoryProductsStarting AtPopular Item
Lighting18$29Smart Dimmer
Climate14$49Smart Thermostat
Security19$79Video Doorbell
Sensors13$19Motion Sensor
Curtains29$89Smart Motor
Energy12$39Smart Plug
Gateways4$59Zigbee Hub
Access13$129Smart Lock

Visual: Clean product grid with category icons Callout: “Start small. Expand anytime.” Speaker Notes: Show breadth, but don’t overwhelm. Emphasize starting point.

Slide 7: AI Magic

Headline: AI That Actually Helps Subhead: Not rules. Not schedules. Real intelligence. Body: Most “smart” devices just follow rules you set. HeyZack learns your life and adapts.

AI Features:

  • 🌅 Morning Routine — Learns when you wake up, adjusts temperature, opens blinds gradually, starts coffee
  • 🔐 Security Mode — Detects when everyone leaves, locks doors, arms sensors, adjusts climate
  • ⚡ Energy Optimizer — Analyzes usage patterns, shifts loads, cuts waste automatically
  • 🌙 Sleep Mode — Dims lights, lowers temp, activates overnight security

Savings Callout: “Average energy savings: $100-150/month”

Visual: App interface showing AI learning patterns, timeline view Speaker Notes: This is the differentiator. Real AI, not marketing AI.

Slide 8: Tyler’s Story

Headline: “Finally, Tech That Just Works Together” Quote:

“I’ve been a smart home enthusiast for years. Ring doorbell, Nest thermostat, Philips Hue lights, August lock—you name it, I’ve tried it. The problem? Nothing talked to each other. I had 7 apps on my phone just to control my apartment.

HeyZack changed everything. I set up 45 devices in one weekend. ONE app. Everything works together. When I say ‘goodnight’ to my voice assistant, the lights dim, doors lock, thermostat drops, and blinds close. Automatically.

This is what smart home was supposed to be.”

Results:

  • 45 devices connected in one weekend
  • Zero hubs cluttering the apartment
  • One app for complete control
  • Voice control that actually works

Attribution: Tyler, Austin TX Visual: Modern urban apartment, clean tech aesthetic Speaker Notes: Tyler validates the tech-savvy audience. Credibility through experience.

Slide 9: Emma’s Story

Headline: “Savings That Make Sense” Quote:

“I was skeptical about ‘smart home’ stuff. It seemed like expensive toys for tech people. But my energy bills were killing me—$400/month in summer, $350 in winter. Something had to change.

My son helped me install HeyZack. It took an afternoon. The first month, my bill dropped to $320. The second month, $290. Now I’m consistently at $280 or less.

It paid for itself in 3 months. I wish I’d found this years ago.”

Results:

  • $120/month in energy savings
  • 30% reduction in energy usage
  • 3-month payback period
  • Zero effort after setup

Attribution: Emma, Portland OR Visual: Warm family home, comfortable and inviting Speaker Notes: Emma validates the practical audience. ROI story is powerful.

Slide 10: Backer Rewards

Headline: Exclusive Kickstarter Pricing Subhead: Early backers get the best deals—up to 30% off retail.

Reward Tiers:

TierBacker PriceRetail ValueWhat’s Included
Starter Kit$149$1995 smart plugs, 1 gateway, app access, 1-year cloud
Home Kit$349$49910 devices (mixed), 2 gateways, AI features, 2-year cloud
Whole Home$699$99925 devices (full mix), 4 gateways, AI, premium support, 3-year cloud

Early Bird Bonus: First 500 backers get free shipping ($25 value)

Guarantee: 30-day no-questions-asked refund policy

Visual: Product bundle photos for each tier Badge: “30% OFF — Kickstarter Exclusive” Speaker Notes: Make the value clear. Risk reversal with guarantee.

Slide 11: Social Proof

Headline: Join Thousands of Smart Homeowners Subhead: You’re in good company.

Trust Metrics:

  • ⭐ 4.8/5 — App Store rating (500+ reviews)
  • 10,000+ — Happy customers worldwide
  • 128 — Products in ecosystem
  • 🌍 16 — Languages supported
  • 🔧 30 min — Average setup time

Testimonial Snippets:

“Best smart home purchase I’ve ever made.” — James, NYC “My wife was skeptical. Now she’s addicted.” — Michael, Chicago “Finally, a system that doesn’t require an IT degree.” — Sarah, Miami

Press Mentions (placeholder):

  • Featured in TechCrunch, The Verge, Wired, CNET

Visual: Customer photo grid, happy homeowners Speaker Notes: Social proof reduces risk. Numbers build confidence.

Slide 12: Call to Action

Headline: Make Your Home Smarter Today Subhead: Back us on Kickstarter and join the smart home revolution. Body: For the price of a few months of energy savings, you can transform your home forever.

Primary CTA: [BACK THIS PROJECT] — Large pink button

Secondary Info:

  • Campaign ends: [Date]
  • Estimated delivery: [Date]
  • Ships worldwide

URL: kickstarter.com/heyzack

Social: @heyzackhome on Twitter, Instagram, Facebook

Visual: Gradient background (#243984 → #E82F89), product family image Logo: White version, prominent placement Speaker Notes: Make the action crystal clear. One button. One decision. Better home.
